text: The full Playwright suite intermittently redirected the existing Google-account sign-in test to the demo repertoire; an isolated three-run repeat and the next full run passed, so the auth redirect race needs deterministic synchronization.

The frontend manually revalidates trusted /api/games responses field-by-field, duplicating backend contracts and making additive or rolling API changes fail as 'invalid-response'. Prefer a generated/versioned API client or typed DTO boundary, and avoid client validation of server-owned invariants such as result limits.
